objective: Fix opencodex Cursor adapter [Tool Call] text leak into rootPromptMessagesJson (protobuf-request.ts): remove assistant tool-call text injection mirroring request-builder.ts, keep tool-result replay, add regression test, verify cursor tests + typecheck.

workPhases.title: Remove [Tool Call] text injection from rootPromptMessages + regression test

tasks.title: Read rootPromptMessages fully + existing cursor test patterns (P)
Remove assistant toolCall->[Tool Call] text loop in protobuf-request.ts (B)
Add regression test: no [Tool Call] assistant text in rootPromptMessagesJson, tool RESULT still present (B)
Run cursor tests + typecheck, capture output (C)

criteria.scenario: protobuf-request.ts rootPromptMessages no longer emits [Tool Call] assistant text for assistant tool-call parts
criteria.expectedEvidence: git diff showing removal of callText loop; rg finds no runtime [Tool Call] emitter left in rootPromptMessages
criteria.capturedEvidence: protobuf-request.ts callText loop removed (git diff --stat: protobuf-request.ts +/-13); post-edit `rg -n \"[Tool Call]\" src` returns NO hits (was the sole emitter at :114). Replaced with explanatory comment mirroring request-builder.ts.

criteria.scenario: New regression test asserts rootPromptMessagesJson has NO [Tool Call] assistant text but DOES keep the tool RESULT text
criteria.expectedEvidence: new test file/case added and passing in test output
criteria.capturedEvidence: Added test 'assistant tool CALL is NOT replayed as [Tool Call] text (model-prompt leak guard)' in tests/cursor-tool-continuation.test.ts; PASS in `bun test` run (expects no [Tool Call]; still contains FILE CONTENTS HERE + call_1).

criteria.scenario: Existing cursor tests still pass (esp. cursor-tool-continuation, cursor-blob)
criteria.expectedEvidence: fresh green test-run output for those files
criteria.capturedEvidence: `bun test tests/cursor-*.test.ts` => 267 pass / 0 fail across 30 files, incl. cursor-tool-continuation (21) and cursor-blob (turns[]-preservation test green).

criteria.expectedEvidence: fresh typecheck/build command output with no errors
criteria.capturedEvidence: `bun x tsc --noEmit` => rc=0, no errors; explicit check `rg cursor/protobuf-request|cursor-tool-continuation` over tsc output => no errors in touched files. (Unrelated pre-existing dirty-worktree files anthropic/openai-responses/catalog were left untouched.)
